methodology.agents: Two isolated Cursor subagents, run sequentially
methodology.agent_a_tools: Shell only (dive, jq) — dive-mcp MCP forbidden
methodology.pre_context: None — fresh subagent per run, new image tag to bust dive-mcp cache

metrics.approach: Ran dive with --json and --ci flags, then parsed the exported JSON with jq to extract efficiency, waste, layer count, and top duplicated file.
Discovered tool schemas, then ran analyze_image, get_wasted_space, and ci_check in parallel against the image.

limitations: Tool I/O char counts are self-reported by agents, not Cursor API token meters
System prompt and reasoning tokens not captured — only tool payload proxy
Constraint compliance (no cross-tool use) is instruction-based, not enforced by sandbox
Single image, single run each — no variance band
dive-mcp MCP server process was already running; image key was new so dive analysis was cold
